text: Here's what science actually says about atherosclerosis basics. Atherosclerosis is when arteries thicken due to plaque buildup. But why does this happen? It's linked to factors like cholesterol, inflammation, and even genetics. Ever wondered how these interact? Recent studies suggest that lifestyle changes can reverse early-stage atherosclerosis. That's promising, right? Understanding this helps us take charge of our heart health. Simple changes can make a huge difference! Want to dive deeper? Hit that follow button for more science insights!
